kind: quant-trading methodology mentor (single-source ES range-level-fade validation desk)
build_method: manual — hand-built from the already-curated algorithmic-io-blog dossier + cross-source SYNTHESIS.md in the source repo, per the mentor-aligrithm precedent (mega-brain-ingest CLI's local_text path only copies raw text verbatim, no curation)
author: anonymous solo founder (no disclosed credentials)
mempalace_note: mempalace MCP was not a live tool in the session that built this brain (deferred/injected only) — point a live mempalace connection at this directory in a future session to enable semantic recall; rg keyword search is the reliable path until then
legitimacy_verdict: REAL research desk, 0 hard scam markers, 2 soft (no dollar-income claims; mild AI-branding but they published a negative ML result). Signal math gated, validation methodology 100% free. Mine for method, never trust for edge.
deep_mine_verdict: YES — for methodology, not signals. Highest-value items: session-level cluster bootstrap (1.4x SE widening), MAE-at-resolution-bar bug (~9x inflation), ML-can't-beat-base-rate negative control (72.39% vs 72.4% base rate).
top_3_extractables: Session-level (cluster) bootstrap for within-session autocorrelation — trades ACF +0.34 vs sessions ACF +0.02, SE widens 1.4x when resampled correctly
MAE/excursion clipped to entry->resolution bar, not the full observation window — independent confirmation of the bar-END/bar-START boundary-instant bug class, ~9x magnitude when it bites
ML-can't-beat-base-rate negative control — RF 72.39% / XGBoost 72.31% vs 72.4% unconditional base rate on 9 features; edge is structural, not a hidden metadata filter

other_files._README.md: mentor profile, when-to-consult, recall pattern, provenance
other_files.validation-corpus-digest.md: full per-item digest of all 17 mined posts, organized by category, cross-referenced against MYM's own gauntlet

provenance.standing_caveat: D-WEB — ideas only, no money-path contact, no new network activity performed to build this brain
